design_philosophy.core_loop: High-speed traversal through side-scrolling levels with ring collection as health system, defeating badniks and bosses to progress through themed zones
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Speed vs. hazards: maintaining momentum while navigating obstacles, spikes, water hazards, bottomless pits, and time limits (10-minute acts)
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Playing as a super-fast hedgehog and flying fox rescuing Chaos Emeralds; achieving invincibility through collectibles
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Introduces Knuckles as antagonist who lays environmental traps; dual-character system allowing Tails to fly and swim adds asymmetric gameplay; expansion-cartridge design (3 & Knuckles) was unprecedented technical innovation; ring-based health system emphasizes resource awareness over lives

difficulty.lives_system: Standard lives system; game over when zero lives remaining; extra lives granted via TV monitor power-ups
difficulty.continues_system: Reaching new levels saves game to one of six save slots, enabling mid-game recovery without full restart
difficulty.checkpointing: Checkpoint system allows respawn at most recently passed checkpoint upon death; levels auto-save upon completion
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Players can choose to control Sonic alone, Tails alone, or both simultaneously; ring collection mitigates damage (up to 99 rings); optional Chaos Emerald collection adds challenge with Super Sonic unlock as reward

progression.upgrade_system: Ring accumulation (health/currency); shield power-ups (underwater breathing, fire resistance, ring attraction); temporary invincibility via TV monitors; Super Sonic transformation unlocked by collecting all seven Chaos Emeralds
progression.unlock_mechanism: Progressing through six zones (two acts each) with miniboss at act 1 end, boss at act 2 end; secret passages and bonus stages (gumball machine corridors and 3D Chaos Emerald stages) provide optional progression
replayability_hooks: Multiple character choices (Sonic, Tails, both) alter traversal options
Chaos Emerald collection unlocks Super Sonic transformation

world_building_techniques: Themed level design (six distinct zones implying locations on mysterious floating island)
Character introduction of Knuckles as guardian antagonist who lays environmental traps
Post-credits scene contingent on Chaos Emerald collection
Implicit narrative: retrieving Chaos Emeralds to stop Doctor Robotnik from relaunching Death Egg space station

boss_design.philosophy: Each level's final act features Robotnik in a thematic boss encounter; minibosses (powerful robots) appear at act 1 conclusion; boss patterns tied to level theme (e.g., Hydrocity zone aquatic context)
notable_bosses: Doctor Robotnik encounters (act 2 bosses of each zone)

faction_indicators: Knuckles as neutral/antagonist (island guardian misled into opposing heroes)
danger_signals: Water hazards triggering drowning (10-minute act timer pressure)
Spikes and bottomless pits indicating no-recovery zones
Robotnik's thematic boss encounters escalate in mechanized complexity
environmental_storytelling: Six themed zones (Angel Island context) suggest exploration narrative
Hydrocity zone's underwater sections create environmental hazard escalation
Level design implies Robotnik's technological control over island
Secret passages reward curiosity and thorough exploration
